methods.description: Process for collecting the actively growing stalagmite sample (Ko-1) from Kocain Cave and preparing specific sections for subsequent trace element and isotope analyses.

steps.description: The actively growing stalagmite (Ko-1) from Kocain Cave, was collected ∼450 m from the cave entrance in August 2005.
Prepare the top 156 mm section of the stalagmite for trace element analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Sub-sample stalagmite for trace element analysis
outputs: Top 156 mm stalagmite section prepared for T-E analysis

steps.description: Prepare the first 174.5 mm section of the stalagmite for isotope analysis at specified intervals.
outputs: First 174.5 mm stalagmite section prepared for isotope analysis

methods.description: Measurement of trace element concentrations (Ca, Mg, Sr, P) in the stalagmite sample using Laser Ablation-Inductively Coupled Plasma-Mass Spectrometry.

steps.description: A total of 31,503 measurements of T-Es (Ca, Mg, Sr, and P) were performed on the top 156 mm at a resolution of ∼5 µm using Laser Ablation-Inductively Coupled Plasma-Mass Spectrometry (Tanner et al., 2002).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform trace element analysis using LA-ICP-MS

methods.description: Measurement of stable oxygen and carbon isotope ratios (δ18O, δ13C) in the stalagmite sample.

steps.description: For oxygen (δ 18 O) and carbon (δ 13 C) isotope measurements, the first 174.5 mm was sampled at intervals of 0.5 mm or less, providing a total of 370 measurements.
outputs: Stable isotope measurement data (370 measurements of δ18O and δ13C)

methods.description: Establishing the age model for the stalagmite using Uranium-Thorium (230Th) dating, including sample preparation, measurement, and data filtering based on detrital contamination.

steps.description: For the chronology of Ko-1, 25 230 Th ages were produced (following the analytical protocol of Cheng et al., 2013)
outputs: Raw 230Th dating results (25 ages with uncertainties and 230Th/232Th ratios)

steps.description: Eight ages affected by significant detrital contamination ( 230 Th/ 232 Th ratios <30) were not included in the age model
steps.searchable_summary: Filter 230Th dating results based on contamination ratio

steps.description: The 17 remaining 230 Th ages have uncertainties varying from ±38-133 years (M = ±67) and only one, at 43 mm (Koç et al., 2020), and dust-layer (335-485 CE) are displayed.
steps.searchable_summary: Build stalagmite age model using filtered 230Th ages
inputs: Filtered 230Th dating results (17 ages with uncertainties)
